Manages various services and functionalities in Pebble firmware, including communication, data management, and device interactions.

## Folders
- **[accessory](accessory/README.md)**: Manages smartstrap devices and communication, including state, connection, profiles, and raw data handling.
- **[activity](activity/README.md)**: Activity tracking and management in Pebble firmware, including algorithms, metrics, insights, and utilities.
- **[alarms](alarms/README.md)**: Alarm management implementation and header files for creation, configuration, scheduling, and pin management.
- **[analytics](analytics/README.md)**: Analytics functionality, syscalls, event logging, data collection, heartbeat metrics, and storage management.
- **[app_glances](app_glances/README.md)**: Manages app glance services and defines related data structures and functions for Pebble firmware.
- **[app_message](app_message/README.md)**: Implements app message receiving and sending functions, including queue management and error handling.
- **[blob_db](blob_db/README.md)**: Database management and synchronization for various data types including apps, contacts, health, notifications, pins, preferences, reminders, timeline items, watch app settings, and weather in Pebble firmware.
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Bluetooth Low Energy heart rate monitor service and Bluetooth persistent storage management.
- **[comm_session](comm_session/README.md)**: Manages app session capabilities, including caching, retrieval, and eviction of capability data.
- **[contacts](contacts/README.md)**: Functions and data structures for managing and serializing contact and address attributes in Pebble firmware.
- **[data_logging](data_logging/README.md)**: Data logging session management, command implementation, endpoint handling, storage, and syscalls for Pebble firmware.
- **[filesystem](filesystem/README.md)**: Functions and APIs for app file management, flash translation, and Pebble File System operations.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Persistent map implementation and management functions for UUID-to-ID mapping in Pebble firmware.
- **[notifications](notifications/README.md)**: Functions and utilities for managing notifications, alerts, and Do Not Disturb settings in Pebble firmware.
- **[process_management](process_management/README.md)**: Manages app order and storage, process commands, and loading processes from flash with mutex protection.
- **[protobuf_log](protobuf_log/README.md)**: Logging and utility functions for data and event logging using Protocol Buffers in Pebble firmware.
- **[settings](settings/README.md)**: Manages and defines operations, structures, and functions for settings files and records.
- **[timeline](timeline/README.md)**: Timeline management and layout functionality for Pebble firmware, including actions, events, and resources.
- **[vibes](vibes/README.md)**: Manages vibration scores, intensity settings, and patterns with related data structures and functions.
- **[voice](voice/README.md)**: Functions and data structures for managing voice dictation sessions and handling voice transcriptions.
- **[weather](weather/README.md)**: Weather service functionality, data management, event handling, forecast creation, and weather type definitions.

## Files
- **[app_cache.c](app_cache.c.md)**: Manages application cache by tracking install date, last launch, launch count, and size, and evicts apps based on priority to free space.
- **[app_cache.h](app_cache.h.md)**: Manages a cache of application binaries on a watch, including adding, removing, and freeing space.
- **[app_fetch_endpoint.c](app_fetch_endpoint.c.md)**: Manages the process of fetching and installing app binaries on a Pebble device, including handling communication with a mobile phone.
- **[app_fetch_endpoint.h](app_fetch_endpoint.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing app fetch operations and errors in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_inbox_service.c](app_inbox_service.c.md)**: Implements an app inbox service for message handling, registration, and management in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_inbox_service.h](app_inbox_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing variable-length data transfer from a kernel service to an app with message handling and error reporting.
- **[app_order_endpoint.c](app_order_endpoint.c.md)**: Handles app order messages by validating and processing UUID lists in a communication session.
- **[app_outbox_service.c](app_outbox_service.c.md)**: Implements the app outbox service for managing message sending and handling in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_outbox_service.h](app_outbox_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing asynchronous data transfer from app to kernel with callbacks and status handling.
- **[audio_endpoint.c](audio_endpoint.c.md)**: Manages audio data transfer sessions, including setup, frame addition, and transfer cancellation.
- **[audio_endpoint.h](audio_endpoint.h.md)**: Functions and types for managing audio data transfer sessions between a watch and phone.
- **[audio_endpoint_private.h](audio_endpoint_private.h.md)**: Defines message structures for data transfer and stop transfer in audio endpoint sessions.
- **[health_sync_endpoint.c](health_sync_endpoint.c.md)**: Implements a health synchronization endpoint for communication and data logging in Pebble firmware.
- **[health_sync_endpoint.h](health_sync_endpoint.h.md)**: Header file with licensing information for the health sync endpoint in Pebble firmware.
- **[music.c](music.c.md)**: Implements a music service abstraction layer for managing music metadata and control services, supporting only one backend at a time.
- **[music.h](music.h.md)**: Header file for interfacing with a music app, defining playback states, commands, and related functions.
- **[music_endpoint.c](music_endpoint.c.md)**: Handles communication and control of music playback between a Pebble device and an Android handset.
- **[music_endpoint.h](music_endpoint.h.md)**: Functions to handle mobile app info and app events for music endpoints.
- **[music_endpoint_types.h](music_endpoint_types.h.md)**: Defines enums and a struct for music control commands and playback state information.
- **[music_internal.h](music_internal.h.md)**: Interfaces and functions for managing music service initialization, metadata, and playback state updates.
- **[persist.c](persist.c.md)**: Manages persistent storage for applications, including file creation, deletion, and access control.
- **[persist.h](persist.h.md)**: Manages persistent app key-value stores with functions for initialization, access, and cleanup.
- **[phone_call.c](phone_call.c.md)**: Manages phone call interactions on a smartwatch, handling incoming, outgoing, and missed calls for Android and iOS.
- **[phone_call.h](phone_call.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, answering, and declining phone calls in the Pebble firmware.
- **[phone_call_util.c](phone_call_util.c.md)**: Functions to create and destroy a `PebblePhoneCaller` object with name and number handling.
- **[phone_call_util.h](phone_call_util.h.md)**: Defines a structure and functions to create and destroy phone call event callers.
- **[send_text_service.c](send_text_service.c.md)**: Manages text sending capabilities and checks for reply action support in notifications.
- **[send_text_service.h](send_text_service.h.md)**: Caches the existence of SEND_TEXT_NOTIF_PREF_KEY and provides functions to initialize and check support.
- **[services_normal.c](services_normal.c.md)**: Initializes and manages various services for the Pebble firmware, including alarms, notifications, and weather.
- **[services_normal.h](services_normal.h.md)**: Functions for initializing services and setting run levels in the Pebble firmware.
- **[stationary.c](stationary.c.md)**: Implements stationary mode management for a device, using accelerometer data to detect motion and manage state transitions.
- **[stationary.h](stationary.h.md)**: Functions for managing stationary mode in a watch, including initialization and state control.
- **[timezone_database.c](timezone_database.c.md)**: Manages a database of timezones, including regions, DST rules, and links, with functions to access and manipulate this data.
- **[timezone_database.h](timezone_database.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for managing and accessing timezone and DST information.
- **[voice_endpoint.c](voice/README.md_endpoint.c)**: Handles voice endpoint communication, including session setup and processing dictation and NLP results.
- **[voice_endpoint.h](voice/README.md_endpoint.h)**: Defines types and functions for setting up voice recognition sessions, including dictation and NLP.
- **[voice_endpoint_private.h](voice/README.md_endpoint_private.h)**: Defines message structures and attribute IDs for voice endpoint communication in Pebble firmware.
- **[wakeup.c](wakeup.c.md)**: Manages wakeup events for applications, including scheduling, dispatching, and handling missed events.
- **[wakeup.h](wakeup.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing wakeup events in the Pebble firmware.
